image.description: Full container image reference for Gitea, including tag

existing.description: Optional: name of an existing PVC to use for the git server. When set, size is ignored.

size.description: Size of the persistent volume claim for the git server

accessMode.description: Access mode of the persistent volume claim for the git server

cpuRequest.description: CPU request for the git server

memoryRequest.description: Memory request for the git server

cpuLimit.description: CPU limit for the git server

memoryLimit.description: Memory limit for the git server

replicaCount.description: Number of git server replicas to deploy

disableRegistration.description: Disables the ability to register new users
